bead.title: frontend: add full-stack run-detail Playwright coverage and p95 render-frame check
bead.description:
PROBLEM
The Story-16 run-detail page lacks a cross-cutting end-to-end test proving that prompt, response, tool trace, and evidence list are all visible together, and there is no performance assertion that a p95-sized dataset renders and becomes interactive within one render frame.

ROOT CAUSE
- cli/internal/server/frontend/e2e/runs-evidence.spec.ts:253-303 covers the evidence tab in isolation but there is no single spec exercising the full stack: prompt visible + response visible + tool trace visible + evidence list visible in one flow.
- No e2e asserts that a p95 dataset (200 tool calls, 30 evidence files) renders all tabs and they become interactive within one render frame.

PROPOSED FIX
- Add a Playwright test test('full stack: prompt/response/tool-trace/evidence', ...) that navigates to /runs/[runId] and asserts prompt content, response content, the tool trace, and the evidence list are all visible.
- Add a p95 performance test seeding a run with 200 tool calls and 30 evidence files and asserting all tabs render and become interactive within one render frame.

NON-SCOPE
- Spec documentation edits to FEAT-008/010/019 (separate child).
- Server audit-event emission (separate child).
- New page or component implementation beyond test fixtures (Story 16.1 / 16.2 own the page).
bead.acceptance:
1. test('full stack: prompt/response/tool-trace/evidence', ...) in cli/internal/server/frontend/e2e exercises prompt visible + response visible + tool trace visible + evidence list visible against /runs/[runId].
2. A p95 e2e test seeds 200 tool calls and 30 evidence files and asserts all tabs render and become interactive within one render frame.
3. bun run test:e2e green.
4. lefthook run pre-commit passes.
